h29a3184dg6e02g4132g9ac7g9b738f8c8055: *Whispers. Moans. Disharmony. They drift through you like an unknown language.*
h1c384efagd6f0g451egb96cg76e75dc8bcf2: *Then, you see visions. Duergar like yourself, chopping myconid remains with their axes.*
hb56bf424g22b9g43ecg9f2fg11375284a41e: *Then, you see visions. Dark dwarves - duergar - chopping myconid remains with their axes.*
h9953b551gfd5bg4925gaf4fgbc952a9088ea: ((*You have broken our peace. You have killed our young.*))
hdca3c507gf1f3g4e5ag8466gd1d79e596466: ((*We laid waste to many. You bring yet another. You bring us the rot.*))
h69380089gf33cg4856gae49g61c58b4a3c4a: *You see another vision: your lifeless body, wrapped in tendrils. The sovereign is threatening you.*
h560d6fa4g26e8g43f4g9340g8410e919a22f: Conjure tranquil memories in hopes of calming the sovereign.
hb1836172g4388g4cfbga843gb28295e5c0af: Kneel in submission. I am not of the killers' clan.
h952b03c9g6159g42degbfafgceb2da63f952: Kneel in submission. My duergar companion means no harm to you.
h970af8eegfc32g4695g9f0ag8f29b917271d: Do you truly wish to do battle with a great warrior?
h6bc01461g36dag48f6g98f5gcd1cb8a351db: *Hums. Clicks. Harmonies. They drift through you like an unknown language.*
hec59e15bg7f35g4046gb295g229dd888c055: *Then, visions. Duergar like yourself, chopping fungal tendrils with their axes.*
h0bf37feeg8b14g4c06g9e1cgbd1b0160d4b5: *Then, visions. Dark dwarves - duergar - chopping fungal tendrils with their axes.*
h04367f93g5728g40afg8e83g453c0162dee2: ((*The dark intruders broke our peace. They killed our young.*))
h96c7ba0eg5f8bg4d86gaf6eg123726b3842c: ((*We laid waste to many. Others remain. You remain.*))
h2c93ae2ag708eg4460g97e8g477496f77bbd: ((*We laid waste to many. Others remain.*))
h575245a3gc171g402dg9eacg98f71bd8abe5: *You see another vision: your lifeless body, wrapped in tendrils. The sovereign is threatening you.*
h88fdfe15g3d22g44d0ga87fge193aa67c5c3: Why did these duergar attack you?
h798bfa52geff7g4cffgadb2g10c3e5961eaf: *Deep purples swirl into familiar shapes: gnomes in mining gear chased by duergar.*
h47a6606eg1340g4d75gb7cbg929aa85007e4: ((*The duergar seek a gnome. It is a guest.*))
h89998e93g0ed2g4394gb1fdg83ff3324c114: Conjure tranquil memories in hopes of calming the sovereign.
h0ae878b9gde0ag4727g86fcg504ce70a0f4a: *Fungal roots weave through your mind, seeking your true intent.*
h01749804g78fdg4f7fg9706g8b0f654a0da2: *The sovereign drones a new melody, cautious but insistent.*
h45058c40gbc12g4fabga0bfg39bc2df3a348: *The sovereign's song halts as it measures your might.*
h2542c98fg8da0g4453g8dbfg61ad55681db5: ((*I will reward. You cleanse the rot. You destroy them.*))
hc0113a02g5e02g4350ga564g025d95a7690b: Utter a githyanki war cry. Did you truly wish to risk battle with me?
h4d5a9463g8cb5g468eg8264g4127b600dbe9: Do you truly wish to do battle with a great warrior?
hb59f3cc9g95a8g4f93ga1f6g48b2a148ec8b: *Fungal roots weave through your mind, seeking your true intent.*
h3b7e4f34gd882g46adg8acfg3695976e03ed: *The sovereign drones a new melody, cautious but insistent.*
h03087c57ge07fg49f9g9757g6615b6d52c18: Kneel in submission. I am not of the killers' clan.
h5d2647edg750bg4d09g9069ge7c6dd325c7c: Kneel in submission. I mean no harm to you.
ha0328ab1gc3bcg4cd8g9839g5fc96855fe19: *Fungal roots weave through your mind, poking you, warning you...*
h039b33c1g0565g4c3cga934gd50b441bdf53: Hum a peaceful tune in harmony with the sovereign.
hf9c16746g75afg4cb0ga6a7ga2b1c08e684a: The Underdark is my home. I do not need your permission to be here.
hb442ec8ag2982g495bg9626g7783872986b4: I know the value of clan. Let me enter, so I may help yours.
he5019579g1fccg493bg98cfg9a5b470a9cb8: *The sovereign's thick fingers stroke the corpse at its feet. A droning melody greets you as the creature turns its gaze to you.*
h36e0ea14g4b14g4b94g96e4g526a07afaa24: ((*Flesh-talker. I show you a memory. Watch and listen.*))
he1dc3b08g6d16g44adga946g23f7fa36966b: *A violent vision grips you: Duergar like yourself, chopping myconid remains.*
hba1e2ca1g4837g4c29ga1f4gdef0954f2e12: *A violent vision grips you: Duergar - dark dwarves - chopping myconid remains.*
h1dfe857cg4341g4cd2gbe03g5c320da1bb8a: ((*Your kind broke our peace. They killed our young.*))
h56e184c4g7dd4g41a2g9a94g1ebc25d0a746: *The sovereign's song slows to the pace of a dirge. It is still in mourning.*
hb8929b8fg3b41g4807gb3f6g2e8b2baca4c9: ((*We laid waste to many. But intruders remain. Lakeward.*))
hf285c3beg75fag4dd7gaed2g67bd452b1b85: *The sovereign's song halts as it measures your worth.*
he7db55d1g8644g4834ga89bgd64a7ba3e704: ((*I sense your resolve. You will find duergar invaders near lake's edge. Cleanse the rot. Destroy them.*))
hb7beb46agdc09g434eg94bcg2084072fa0d5: Let us spill blood. Duergar or myconid - I care not which.
hd41f3692ge241g4b7fg9899g9bc6a8c6b050: *Deep purples swirl into familiar shapes: gnomes in mining gear chased by duergar.*
hf5cfdf7dg2cdcg4177ga39ag35d57325dd80: ((*The duergar seek a gnome. It is a guest.*))
h326592edg65b3g4243gb688g606fdcdbb70c: Sure, I can handle those duergar nearby.
hfb06bf23gf658g47c6g9827gc5afa5bac52f: *An illusion comes over you: a duergar, choking on a cloud of gleaming dust.*
h32b30594gaec9g45f1gb617gf67a6e6203fe: ((*I can spare you no warrior - too many were lost.*))
hec1a0911g650bg4bc1g9279g0283bfe5d959: ((*But accept this gift. It will help you exterminate.*))
h4d120b1bg3ce9g449dg818cg721d7a9395d8: *The sovereign shows one more vision: a wall of vines parting to reveal glowing light.*
hb89a23a2gdf14g4305ga71ag742a30be9dac: *The sovereign gifts you one more vision: a wall of vines parting to reveal glowing light.*
hdedd20acg7c3bg45acg87eag8f0dacfa0b02: ((*Riches of magic and mind. Cleanse the rot, and they are yours.*))
h93931cf3g2690g40f0g818ageee6a474ab56: ((*You do the circle a service. We will await word.*))
h86aa881cgb9ddg4238g9c4dg4ecb85614a28: Forget it. If you want them dead, you can kill them yourself.
h26e8aab3gd6fdg4718g90b7g0df54406ce16: *It replies with an echoing screech, and returns its gaze to the corpse. Unusual spores waft from the decaying flesh.*
h55d5944egfea3g403cg8592g0f9185fb076b: Duergar invaders? We can manage that - better than picking this fight, surely.
hc4c9e9c1g9675g4542g92d4ga7f8bdc90599: I admit, I like this one's approach. A little genocidal, but effective.
h2e79a9d2g7776g4563g8eb2g750a141ae85a: Duergar killed their children? The Blade must avenge them.
h62765e54g77aag429bga27cgcf1d2d9e25d9: I suppose such wicked killers deserve wicked ends.
h7f7ba61fg0e31g4d72ga399g3a2c32b90690: *It greets you with a harrowing elegy, cheerless as the new moon.*
h00d9b69bg4134g4e37g8c8fg1ae7f01e99b5: I'll cleanse the rot. Those duergar near the lake will die.
h4d9f7cb8g25dag41c7gba1fg10f60a8aeabe: The duergar attacked you in those visions - why?
h03d89586g7be7g4156gb448gecd3897cc877: The duergar are slain; the rot has been purged.
h805af719g74a5g44b6g80abgcb6fdbe7fc97: *The music shifts - still melancholic, but now streaked with hope.*
h89a2b731gd765g43dag8d88gf8afb4222e47: ((*Do you hear, Kin Spirit? A new harmony. Serenity. I now deem you Peace Bringer.*))
he6721c84g80ccg4504gbb73g048d6e97dc39: *Fragrant spores waft through the air. Your heart swells with bliss with your every breath.*
h282549ccg9d3fg45c4ga84dg9158441aee3b: ((*Freely you have given us. But our treasure's seal has been broken.*))
hf3533a0eg6b54g4001g88d0ge4a504280e88: ((*Follow the one we call 'Brew'. Promised rewards might still await you.*))
h1f68c0f8gf6e0g4e1cg87cdg57f4df8f465c: ((*Freely you have given to us. Freely you may take.*))
hf6babb24g3b60g4fc5g8a3ag1c058ec1598a: ((*Follow the one we call 'Brew'. Promised treasure awaits you.*))
haa5d5ff0gad95g434fg992agb8d30d7fa577: ((*Do you hear? A new harmony. Serenity. I name you Peace Bringer.*))
h7b1fa902g5f30g491eg8d22g38c9bb44d0bb: What in the Hells did you do to that corpse?
h749d23cage199g4feag846bgc7bfdd8aec69: ((*We breathe life into our enemies' flesh.*))
h097f87b8g2cfcg41dagb15egcb2237800911: ((*The dead make a fine host for my growing children.*))
h64bde90bg5240g4a26g97ccgc72d5835adbe: If I die down here, destroy my corpse.
hade3a486gc3f1g4053g8507g11b37988ea8e: These spores hold such power. How might I gain this knowledge?
hca3c62aegc545g41e0gbadbgd7ff99099182: ((*You may not. The spores hear only the circle. They dance to no other harmony.*))
hea9f55d2g16a2g484eg8c2bg443ced12a50a: The spore-magic is repulsive. You die by my hand!
hccfb1d28g9e0fg40cagafecg659ecdf00d33: Duergar, reduced to cadaverous puppets? You will die by my hand!
h174f4effg8759g48e8g9ed1gc95141785825: You planted animating spores in the corpse, yes?
hc949e280g3b80g456dga600gdcf94f117d31: ((*Yes. Our enemies' flesh makes a fine host for my growing children.*))
h70ace41cg9cf7g4d11g94bagf52ffe72b949: Planting spores in a corpse - what magic is this?
hf33c981bg3c01g4738g8c50g07b525f65f20: I have slain the creature called Glut. It was scheming to slaughter your circle.
h055df989g99c5g4485gade5gbdb3d3178fd4: *You are one with Spaw. Your throat tightens, then relaxes. The air is serene, your mind untroubled.*
hd1ffcc54gf292g4b30ga557g672387cd724f: ((*You aid us twice over. So twice I will thank you.*))
h4378b4a8gd58dg45fcgb127ga16ca186ffb2: *The air fills with spores. They fill your nose and your lungs, sweet and refreshing.*
hfcf65750g1e45g4eb7g9a47g133e5c9b4c96: ((*The songs we sing now carry your spirit. I first named you Peace Bringer. I now name you Kin Spirit.*))
h9f235ae3g86a4g4b3dgaea1g805d2653e755: ((*Among us, you will always be welcome.*))
h696f39a8g4f88g4bf1g866dg4afc2e3f4f3c: ((*The songs we sing now carry your spirit. You shall now be called Kin Spirit.*))
h7a2d0b51g905bg4e1cg8c4dg4e6a06afe17f: ((*You aid us in good faith. In good faith, I thank you.*))
